## 2026-07-12

- fix: chat auto-scroll yanks reader to bottom on every message; cost dupe key (05bc782, Arthur Magaya)
- chore: auto-generate CHANGELOG.md from git log on every push to main (e048929, Arthur Magaya)
- k8s: scale peers to 5, add anti-affinity + PodDisruptionBudget for stability (5a216fd, Arthur Magaya)
- design: warmer display font, drop mono eyebrow labels, open up tracking (ec8e913, Arthur Magaya)
- perf: route-level code splitting + vendor chunk + gzip compression (bdb159c, Arthur Magaya)

## 2026-07-12

- add Kubernetes manifests (primary + peer StatefulSets, 3-5 pod scale-out) (d2c6034, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: reflection double-counts every delegated tool run via the peer:delegate mirror record (5c134ef, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: github per-repo readers swallow 401, turning a dead token into fake empty success (f8454b5, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: users.lookup returns null for self-referential queries, feeding email.send a placeholder recipient (f9af254, Arthur Magaya)
- security: dependency CVEs, enterprise-mode auth gap, user enumeration, root container (8ad41d8, Arthur Magaya)
- docs: write the 5 missing Track 3 competition documents (177389e, Arthur Magaya)
- chore: add pg driver for Postgres data-source connections (9ec54a5, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: action the 2026-07-10 reflection's email.send + vault.read items (453a14d, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: action the 2026-07-09 reflection's 4 "try next" items (27447f5, Arthur Magaya)
- docs: document the governance policy constraint gate (cef4c95, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: Cost page undercounts spend — uses real token usage, not chars/4 (7ea1b98, Arthur Magaya)
- fix: heuristicPlan misroutes GitHub+action tasks to research.deep (1aa0b74, Arthur Magaya)
- refactor: rename CLAWBOT_* env prefix and package identities to NEUROWORKS_* (f222073, Arthur Magaya)
- docs: fix hardcoded old repo URL in 2 places after the rename (74ee934, Arthur Magaya)
- docs: reflect the clawbot -> neuroworks repo rename in the README (6466bb0, Arthur Magaya)
